name: HELLO
comment: Smallest functional ZDL: pass-through DSP from the LineSel template, relabeled. Used to validate the build / flash / boot loop end-to-end before porting any real DSP.

label.comment: On-screen FX name in .const. Anchor 'OnOff\0' appears once; the visible label slot starts 43 bytes later.

info.comment: sort_index 250 keeps HELLO out of the way of factory FX (originals top out at 240).
